translations.**Web App API 會跳轉址：** 基於安全性，Content serv:
**Web App API will redirect:** For security reasons, the Content service response will redirect to a one-time `script.googleusercontent.com` URL; HTTP clients need to support following redirects.  
Some webhook services will fail if they do not automatically follow 302 redirects (e.g., Jira Webhook).
translations.**Web App HTML** ：網頁頂部會有防濫用聲明、無法達成真 RWD: **Web App HTML**: The webpage header includes an anti-abuse notice. True RWD is not achievable (the page is actually an iframe inside Google's framework). The URL is ugly and cannot be customized. Full-screen PWA pages are not possible.
translations.**內建整合服務 Built-in Services:**\n**不需在 GAS:
**Built-in Services:**  
**Can be used without referencing in GAS services.**
translations.**冷啟動：** Faas 服務的通病，當任務太久沒觸發會進入睡眠、再次觸發時需:
**Cold Start:** A common issue with Faas services is that when a task hasn't been triggered for a long time, it goes to sleep, causing a longer wait time when triggered again.  
This problem, combined with the requirement for synchronous (blocking) execution, means that if deployed as a Webhook for other services to call, it can easily be judged as a failed request, leading to repeated requests, repeated receptions, and repeated executions.  
For example, Slack strictly requires the Webhook server to respond within 3 seconds, and this issue has often been encountered in past experience.

translations.**單次執行以同步阻塞為主** ：你無法在單次 execution 內派發多個執: **Single execution mainly uses synchronous blocking**: You cannot dispatch multiple threads to run tasks concurrently within a single execution; if tasks are time-consuming or require extensive parallel processing, it is recommended to split them into multiple executions and use scheduled triggers.

Use a third-party [Design Skill](https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-skills){:target="_blank"} to complete the design. My prompt is roughly as follows:
translations.**最長執行 6 分鐘：** 每次執行最多 6 分鐘，任務太大太多建議分段處理。:
**Maximum Execution Time 6 Minutes:** Each run can last up to 6 minutes. For large or numerous tasks, it is recommended to split them into segments.  
Additionally, there is a total quota limit, such as Triggers running up to 90 minutes per day. **(However, this seems to be a soft limit; many of my scripts exceed this limit without being blocked.)**
translations.**服務限制：** 還有一些服務取用的限制，不過正常使用下不太會踩到上限，除非你: **Service Limits:** There are some usage limits for services, but under normal use, you usually won't hit them. However, if you need high-frequency checks or real-time responses, it's easy to reach those limits.
translations.**目標 — 用現有資源建置一個簡易的 App 打包平台**\n當時的背景是 A:
**Goal — Build a Simple App Packaging Platform Using Existing Resources**  
The background was that the app packaging service moved to GitHub Actions, but non-engineering teams also needed app packaging, which was previously handled manually. A service was needed within the company team to connect to GitHub Actions for packaging.  
Using Google Apps Script Web App as the platform, access was restricted to organization accounts only. Users filled in packaging info on a form, which triggered GitHub Actions (via GitHub API) and sent packaging notifications to Slack.  
The packaged app was uploaded to Firebase App Distribution. **However, Google Apps Script has no built-in library, but [after some research, it can be done directly with googleapis](../71400d408dc8/), and it was smoothly integrated in the end.**  
ref: “[Using Google Apps Script Web App to Connect GitHub Actions and Build a Free, Easy Packaging Tool Platform](../4273e57e7148/)”
translations.**目標 — 自動彙整營運數據到 Google Sheet。**\n承上做法，當:
**Goal — Automatically consolidate operational data into Google Sheet.**  
Following the previous approach, a Web App was created so the entire operational data could be clearly displayed on the team's TV wall; **the technical issue at that time was that some data was internal**, inaccessible from the external network. Fortunately, the solution was to switch to an internal scheduled task that sends data daily to the Google Apps Script Web App, which then processes and writes it back to Google Sheet.  
ref:「 [使用 Google Apps Script 實現每日數據報表 RPA 自動化](../f6713ba3fee3/) 」
translations.**目標 — 自動查詢 GA 流量/Crash-free rate 發到 Sla:
**Goal — Automatically query GA traffic/Crash-free rate and send it to the Slack work channel.**  
Google Apps Script already has built-in AnalyticsData / AdSense Libraries. You just need to import and set the parameters to use them directly, making integration almost painless.  
If the app wants to query crash issue details or the Top 10, you just need an extra step: **Firebase to BigQuery**, then import the BigQuery Library in Google Apps Script and run SQL queries to achieve this.  
ref: 「 [Crashlytics + Google Analytics Auto Query App Crash-Free Users Rate](../793cb8f89b72/) 」、「 [Crashlytics + Big Query Build More Real-Time Convenient Crash Tracking Tool](../e77b80cc6f89/) 」
translations.**目標 —對外公開的 Email 窗口收到信時希望能轉發到 Slack 工作:
**Goal — When the public-facing email inbox receives a message, forward it to the Slack work channel.**  
**Technically, Google Apps Script does not have an event triggered when Gmail receives an email**, so we use a different approach with a scheduled trigger running every minute (or longer): check unread emails ➡️ read content ➡️ strip HTML and forward to Slack ➡️ mark as read.  
If you only want to target specific emails (by sender or subject), set up a Label Filter in Gmail, then change the check from unread emails to unread emails with that Label to achieve this.  
ref: 「 [Using Google Apps Script to Forward Gmail Messages to Slack](../d414bdbdb8c9/) 」

Then return to the editor, edit `appsscript.json`, change the oauthScopes content, run once, and then change it back and run again. This should trigger the authorization process.*

The Web Editor can sometimes crash or accidentally overwrite new code with old code when multiple tabs are open. Clasp makes writing and managing source code more convenient and secure.*

translations.- **Service Limits:** There are some usa: - **Service Limits:** There are some usage limits for services, but under normal use, you usually won't hit them. However, if you need high-frequency checks or real-time responses, it's easy to reach those limits.
translations.- **User-Agent Cannot Be Customized:** F:
- **User-Agent Cannot Be Customized:** For security and abuse prevention reasons, Google Apps Script User-Agent cannot be specified by the user. (However, other header fields can be set.)  
  **Impact:** Some rare APIs require data in the User-Agent, or target websites/APIs block the Google Apps Script User-Agent. Both cases are hard limits and cannot be bypassed.  
  **Workaround:** [If you really need to use it, you can proxy through a Cloudflare Worker.](https://zhgchg.li/posts/88f0fb935120/){:target="_blank"}

- **Maximum Execution Time 6 Minutes:** Each run can last up to 6 minutes. For large or numerous tasks, it is recommended to split them into segments.  
  Additionally, there is a total quota limit, such as Triggers running up to 90 minutes per day. **(However, this seems to be a soft limit; many of my scripts exceed this limit without being blocked.)**

- **Single execution mainly uses synchronous blocking:** You cannot dispatch multiple threads to run tasks concurrently within a single execution; if tasks are time-consuming or require extensive parallel processing, it is recommended to split them into multiple executions and use scheduled triggers.

- **Cold Start:** A common issue with Faas services is that when a task hasn't been triggered for a long time, it goes to sleep, causing a longer wait time when triggered again.  
  This problem, combined with the requirement for synchronous (blocking) execution, means that if deployed as a Webhook for other services to call, it can easily be judged as a failed request, leading to repeated requests, repeated receptions, and repeated executions.  
  For example, Slack strictly requires the Webhook server to respond within 3 seconds, and this issue has often been encountered in past experience.

- **Web App API will redirect:** For security reasons, the Content service response will redirect to a one-time `script.googleusercontent.com` URL; HTTP clients need to support following redirects.  
  Some webhook services will fail if they do not automatically follow 302 redirects (e.g., Jira Webhook).

- **Web App HTML:** The webpage header includes an anti-abuse notice. True RWD is not achievable (the page is actually an iframe inside Google's framework). The URL is ugly and cannot be customized. Full-screen PWA pages are not possible.
translations.- Authorization is only required during: - Authorization is only required during the first run or when new permissions are added
translations.- Automatically Query GA Traffic/Crash-f:
- Automatically Query GA Traffic/Crash-free Rate and Send to Slack Work Channel:  
  Use Analytics Data API to fetch data, PropertiesService to store Slack Bot Token, and UrlFetchApp to call Slack Send Message API.

- Automatically aggregate operational data into Google Sheet and data Dashboard Web:  
  Trigger scheduled execution of functions, use LockService to ensure only I run it, fetch data with Analytics Data API, get external service data via UrlFetchApp, write to Google Sheet with SpreadsheetApp, output Web App interface using HtmlService, output JSON data with ContentService plus data caching via CacheService.
translations.- DocumentApp → Google Docs\n\n- Spreads:
- DocumentApp → Google Docs

- SpreadsheetApp → Google Sheets

- SlidesApp → Google Slides

- FormApp → Google Forms

- GmailApp → Gmail

- CalendarApp → Google Calendar

- DriveApp → Google Drive

- SitesApp → Google Sites

- Maps → Maps / Distance / Routes

- Translate → Translation

translations.- Not part of the Google ecosystem, such:
- Not part of the Google ecosystem, such as wanting to connect with Microsoft Office or OneNote…

- Hybrid local and cloud setup is more suitable for n8n or AI Agent.

- Complex calculations or large data processing may not complete within the 6-minute maximum execution time per run.

- Large-scale web scraping or ticket-snatching programs are out of the question. Google Apps Script is easily blocked or stopped by Cloudflare's anti-scraping measures.
translations.- Sheets API\n\n- Drive API\n\n- Calenda:
- Sheets API

- Drive API

- Calendar API

- Gmail API

- Analytics API / Analytics Data API

- BigQuery API

- Adsense API

- YouTube Data API

- Tasks API

- Googleapis (Other/GCP)
translations.- UrlFetchApp → Calling External APIs\n\:
- UrlFetchApp → Calling External APIs

- PropertiesService → Key-Value Storage

- CacheService → Cache

- LockService → Concurrency Control Prevention

- Utilities → Date / Hash / Base64

- Logger → Log Output

- HtmlService → Build Web UI, support Ajax asynchronous content updates

- ContentService → Creating an API endpoint

- Trigger → Scheduled Automatic Execution
translations.- Web Apps have four access levels: anyo:
- Web Apps have four access levels: anyone, only yourself, only signed-in users, and signed-in users within the organization.

- The design in the above example is simple: everyone can access it but must enter the correct random Token to view the data. The weather can be changed to your own location, and multiple locations are also supported.

- The calendar defaults to handling only the primary calendar. If you have other calendars, you can get the Calendar ID from Calendar Settings and Sharing -> Integrate calendar -> Calendar ID.

- **Added a lazy development section here, directly asking AI to deploy and test the Web App entry so it can develop, test, and fix simultaneously, then notify me when it's done**
translations.- [required] Tell the AI: Remove all dev:
- [required] Tell the AI: Remove all development-stage interfaces/endpoints after development is complete

- [optional] Google Apps Script Project -> Project Settings -> Script Properties -> `ACCESS_TOKEN` -> regenerate a random string, and replace the `?token=` in the URL with this string  
  On macOS, you can generate a random string with this command: `openssl rand -hex 32`

- [optional] [Regenerate the Central Weather Bureau API Key](https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/userLogin){:target="_blank"} and enter it into Google Apps Script Project -> Project Settings -> Script Properties -> `CWA_API_KEY`
translations.1. **Goal — When the public-facing email:
1. **Goal — When the public-facing email inbox receives a message, forward it to the Slack work channel.**  
   **Technically, Google Apps Script does not have an event triggered when Gmail receives an email**, so we use a different approach with a scheduled trigger running every minute (or longer): check unread emails ➡️ read content ➡️ strip HTML and forward to Slack ➡️ mark as read.  
   If you only want to target specific emails (by sender or subject), set up a Label Filter in Gmail, then change the check from unread emails to unread emails with that Label to achieve this.  
   ref: 「 [Using Google Apps Script to Forward Gmail Messages to Slack](../d414bdbdb8c9/) 」

2. **Goal — Automatically query GA traffic/Crash-free rate and send it to the Slack work channel.**  
   Google Apps Script already has built-in AnalyticsData / AdSense Libraries. You just need to import and set the parameters to use them directly, making integration almost painless.  
   If the app wants to query crash issue details or the Top 10, you just need an extra step: **Firebase to BigQuery**, then import the BigQuery Library in Google Apps Script and run SQL queries to achieve this.  
   ref: 「 [Crashlytics + Google Analytics Auto Query App Crash-Free Users Rate](../793cb8f89b72/) 」、「 [Crashlytics + Big Query Build More Real-Time Convenient Crash Tracking Tool](../e77b80cc6f89/) 」

3. **Goal — Automatically consolidate operational data into Google Sheet.**  
   Following the previous approach, a Web App was created so the entire operational data could be clearly displayed on the team's TV wall; **the technical issue at that time was that some data was internal**, inaccessible from the external network. Fortunately, the solution was to switch to an internal scheduled task that sends data daily to the Google Apps Script Web App, which then processes and writes it back to Google Sheet.  
   ref:「 [Using Google Apps Script to Automate Daily Data Reports with RPA](../f6713ba3fee3/) 」

4. **Goal — Build a Simple App Packaging Platform Using Existing Resources**  
   The background was that the app packaging service moved to GitHub Actions, but non-engineering teams also needed app packaging, which was previously handled manually. A service was needed within the company team to connect to GitHub Actions for packaging.  
   Using Google Apps Script Web App as the platform, access was restricted to organization accounts only. Users filled in packaging info on a form, which triggered GitHub Actions (via GitHub API) and sent packaging notifications to Slack.  
   The packaged app was uploaded to Firebase App Distribution. **However, Google Apps Script has no built-in library, but [after some research, it can be done directly with googleapis](../71400d408dc8/), and it was smoothly integrated in the end.**  
   ref: “[Using Google Apps Script Web App to Connect GitHub Actions and Build a Free, Easy Packaging Tool Platform](../4273e57e7148/)”

translations.Google Apps Script 可以視為是環繞 Google 服務場景的: Google Apps Script can be seen as a FAAS scripting tool centered around Google services. It has more limitations but is **currently completely free and seamlessly integrates with Google services;** other FAAS services usually require payment, though some offer free tiers, and integrating with Google services involves formal IAM or OAuth processes that are more complex and cumbersome.

translations.```\n/huashu-design\n設計一個可以在 iPhone 8 Pl:
```
/huashu-design
Design a web dashboard that can be viewed in landscape mode on an iPhone 8 Plus, and save the design results in the ./Design directory
- It will be deployed later as a Google Apps Script Web App
- The top area fixedly displays the date, weekday, and a flipping clock
- The bottom tabs switch periodically and show a timed progress bar
- The bottom tabs include:
-- Weather conditions
-- Calendar: current events or upcoming events of the day, showing remaining events
-- Countdown/Count-up days
```
translations.```\n/init\n⏺ 建立了 CLAUDE.md，內容聚焦本 repo 實:
```
/init
⏺ Created CLAUDE.md, focusing on the current state of this repo:
  - Project stage: Early GAS project, currently only has appsscript.json / .clasp.json / Design/Paper Dashboard.html, no .gs code yet.
  - File purpose: manifest settings (V8, America/New_York, Stackdriver), clasp-bound scriptId, and a React+CDN visual prototype (without google.script.run).
  - Common commands: mainly clasp (push / pull / open / logs / deploy), no lint or test runner yet.
  - Notes before push: skipSubdirectories: false will upload Design/Paper Dashboard.html; manifest lacks oauthScopes declaration; timezone setting location.
  - Scope: Strictly use only this repo’s content, no reference to other projects (following your memory rules)
```
translations.```\n/plan\n實現 ./Design 的 Dashboard 網頁功能:
```
/plan
Implement the Dashboard web page features and design from ./Design, deploy to Google Apps Script Web App.
- Use the Central Weather Bureau API from the Ministry of Transportation and Communications for weather https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/api/v1/rest/datastore/F-C0032-00
- Display the weather for Taipei City, show all available fields
- During development, you can generate a Token yourself and deploy the Web App to trigger necessary methods and test; be sure to remove this open access after development is complete
- Deploy the Web App so everyone can access it, but protect it with a custom Token; first-time users can enter the Token or pass it via URL
- Default calendar to read: primary
- Countdown days read from the Google Sheet I gave you, with title, date, repeat; if repeat is yes, it means an annual recurring countdown, also show how many years and months have passed (rounded down)
- API Key, Google Sheet ID/GID, etc. all stored in PropertiesService settings
- Use clasp push & deploy for me, clasprc login token stored in keychain security add-generic-password \ -U \ -s "com.google.clasp" \ -a "$USER"
- If manual steps are needed from me, please tell me each step in Traditional Chinese
- "oauthScopes": [ "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.external_request", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.scriptapp" ]
- Double-check if the google.script.run integration call format is correct
- The live GAS Web App HTML is rendered inside an iframe wrapper.
- Files like ./Design that do not need to be uploaded to Google Apps Script should be added to .claspignore
```
translations.```bash\n- GAS Web App 只做後端服務，輸出 JSON 給前:
```bash
- GAS Web App only serves as the backend, outputting JSON for frontend use
- Frontend uses GitHub Pages for design, presentation, and deployment, handling all development and deployment tasks
- A custom random string token protects communication between frontend and backend
```
translations.```markdown\n\n⏺ 我先掌握了脈絡：iPhone 8 Plus 橫:
```markdown

⏺ I first grasped the context: iPhone 8 Plus landscape = 736×414 CSS px, the content data structure (weather / calendar / countdown) is clearly defined in CLAUDE.md.  
  You haven't specified the style yet, so as your "design direction consultant," I'll give you 3 distinctly different style options. Please choose one (or mix and match, e.g., "font from A + colors from C"), then I'll create the full hi-fi design.  
  ---  
  🅐 Option 1 · Massimo Vignelli Style Swiss Grid (Information Architecture)  
  ▎ Vignelli’s grid aesthetics for NYC subway — Helvetica + strict columns + red, black, white. The information itself is decoration, no illustrations, icons, or gradients.  
  - Fonts: Neue Haas Grotesk / Inter Tight (display) + IBM Plex Mono (clock/numbers)  
  - Colors: pure white background #FAFAFA · pure black ink #0A0A0A · single vermilion accent #E63946 (used for progress bar and current tab)  
  - Layout: 12-column baseline grid, all elements aligned; flip clock with black background, white large text + thin horizontal separators; tabs are square color blocks  
  - Keywords: rational / restrained / print-like / information density / timeless  
  - Suitable for: you want a dashboard that won’t go out of style, like a high-quality newspaper front page  
  ---  
  🅑 Option 2 · Dieter Rams × Braun Industrial Instruments (Minimalist Industrial)  
  ▎ Rams’ aesthetics for Braun ET66 calculator and audio systems — light beige-gray background + rounded hardware panels + single orange accent +  
  ▎ tactile physical buttons. Each section looks like an independent instrument panel.  
  - Fonts: Söhne / Inter (labels) + JetBrains Mono (clock styled as LCD seven-segment)  
  - Colors: warm beige-gray #E5E1DA · deep charcoal #2B2B2B · Braun orange #E85D2C accent · flip clock LCD yellow-green #A8B547 vintage LCD style  
  - Layout: each card has subtle inner shadow and 1px hairline border for a recessed physical instrument feel; tab switching looks like button press  
  - Keywords: industrial design / tactile / 1970s Braun / calm / engineer aesthetics  
  - Suitable for: you like hardware feel and want comfort for long viewing  
  ---  
  🅒 Option 3 · Teenage Engineering OP-1 / Terminal (Sporty Poetics)  
  ▎ TE’s OP-1 synth panel and vintage OLED terminal aesthetics — dark charcoal background + OLED teal glow + mono fonts + fine grid background. Flip clock is a large OLED  
  ▎ flip display, progress bar resembles sequencer step lights.  
  - Fonts: JetBrains Mono / IBM Plex Mono (all) + Berkeley Mono (display large text)  
  - Colors: background #0E0F0D · main text #E8E5DA off-white · OLED teal #9DEF8F accent · warning orange #FFB454  
  - Layout: very faint 8px dot grid background; flip clock large text occupies 1/3 width with subtle scanlines; tab progress bar uses LED stepping; weather uses ASCII-style icons  
  - Keywords: OLED / cyberdeck / analog synth / hacker chic / hacker culture  
  - Suitable for: you want it to feel like a “device” on your desk, not just a “webpage”  
  ---  
  Please tell me which one you choose (or which elements to mix), then I’ll proceed with the full hi-fi design into ./Design/. You can also say “none fit, show me more,” and I’ll suggest another style.
```
translations.```python\n⏺ Scope is updated and pushed:
```python
⏺ Scope is updated and pushed but the deployer's OAuth grant needs to be re-authorized for the new scope. The web app runs under your account — newly added
  scopes require you to re-grant.

  Please do this once:

  1. Open the editor: https://script.google.com/d/1KEWgIql-gqTNI_Tv_w2-5t7VE_R0eBtjAtd3iqLqabYLOnzJZ8Ga8N4s/edit
  2. From the function dropdown at the top, pick setupConfig (or any function)
  3. Click Run — Google will pop an "Authorization required" dialog
  4. Allow → grants the upgraded auth/spreadsheets scope
  5. Tell me when done and I'll re-test the countdown handler
```
translations.```rust\n Action needed from you (one-t:
```rust
  Action needed from you (one-time):

  1. Open the editor: https://script.google.com/d/1KEWgIql-gqTNI_Tv_w2-5t7VE_R0eBtjAtd3iqLqabYLOnzJZ8Ga8N4s/edit
  2. Top-right "Deploy" → "Manage deployments"
  3. Delete both existing deployments (the bare @HEAD and dev v1 — the pencil-icon edit doesn't let you change access type)
  4. Then "New deployment" → Type: Web app → Execute as: Me (your account) → Who has access: Anyone → Deploy
  5. Grant OAuth on the consent screen (calendar.readonly, spreadsheets.readonly, external_request)
  6. Copy the new web app URL (looks like https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycb.../exec) and paste it here

  Also paste:
  - CWA API Key (Central Weather Bureau Open Data Authorization)
  - Countdown Sheet ID (the long part in the Sheet URL between /d/ and /edit)
  - Sheet GID (the number after gid= in the URL — defaults to 0 for the first tab)

  Once I have the URL + secrets, I'll seed Properties via the dev endpoint, mint the access token, verify each handler, and wire you in.
```
translations.```yaml\n1. OK，你直接幫我部署\n CWA API Key: C:
```yaml
1. OK, please deploy it for me directly
  CWA API Key: CWA-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX
  Countdown Sheet ID: XXXX / GID: 0
```
translations.iOS 滿版 PWA 網頁設定 -> Safari 打開網址 -> 分享 ->: iOS Full-Screen PWA Web Setup -> Open URL in Safari -> Share -> Add to Home Screen
translations.「辦法總比困難多」的前提，是 **技術上可行且合理** ；換句話說「方向錯了，努: The premise of "there are more solutions than difficulties" is that it must be **technically feasible and reasonable**; in other words, "if the direction is wrong, effort is in vain." We may not need to actually write code, but we must know when to "choose" to use Google Apps Script to develop small tools.
translations.一直有一台汰換下來的 iPhone 8 Plus (iOS 16.7) 放在抽屜: I have an old iPhone 8 Plus (iOS 16.7) that I replaced and left unused in a drawer. I thought I could turn it into a desktop dashboard to display real-time information I want to see.
translations.上面範例的設計是簡單做：所有人都可以存取但需要輸入正確的亂數 Token 才能看: The design in the above example is simple: everyone can access it but must enter the correct random Token to view the data. The weather can be changed to your own location, and multiple locations are also supported.
translations.了解完限制再來看看有哪些優勢、功能。\n\n: After understanding the limitations, let's look at the advantages and features.
translations.以 AI 變廢為寶 —用 Claude Design & Claude Code: Turning Waste into Treasure with AI — Using Claude Design & Claude Code to Build Your Personal Desktop Dashboard as an Example.
translations.以上就是這次使用 AI Agent 直接進行 Google Apps Scrip: This concludes the introduction to using AI Agents directly for Google Apps Script development. Recently, I have also been using AI to refactor medium to large GAS projects I developed before, with great results. **I can even ask it to add function unit tests locally (using Jest, MOCK Google APIs) to improve stability** (running on CI/CD, combined with clasp pull & backup GAS Project); the AI’s mastery and accuracy in producing GAS code are nearly 100%.
translations.個人或是團隊內工作流程串接，以我個人來說我有很多腳本在幫我管理日常例行公事，例如: For personal or team workflow integration, I have many scripts managing my daily routines. For example, I get daily notifications of [zhgchg.li](https://zhgchg.li/){:target="_blank"} website traffic overview, GitHub Repo Issues, and even update the current stock prices in a Google Sheet. For teams, the app release process can integrate with Google Calendar to check events and trigger the corresponding CI/CD process (calling GitHub Actions), then send messages to the team Slack channel and forward app review failure emails to Slack.
translations.先 Init Claude Code Memory Markdown:\n\n: First, Init Claude Code Memory Markdown:
translations.只有第一次執行或是有新增權限時會需要授權\n: Authorization is only required during the first run or when new permissions are added
translations.可以選擇喜歡的風格或是跟 AI 說自己想要的風格，例如 `紙感風格，米白宣紙 +: You can choose your preferred style or tell the AI the style you want, for example, "paper texture style, off-white rice paper + red seal stamp aesthetics."
translations.因為 GAS Web App 無法達成真 RWD、滿版 PWA (隱藏網址列)，: Because GAS Web App cannot achieve true RWD or full-screen PWA (hiding the address bar), I use the GAS Web App as an API service that only returns JSON data, and implement the frontend separately with GitHub Pages, deploying it as an official website; this way, a complete user experience can be achieved.
translations.地端雲端混合，這比較適合 n8n or AI Agent 來做\n: Hybrid local and cloud setup is more suitable for n8n or AI Agent.
translations.執行 Plan 規劃開發工作:\n\n: Execute the plan and schedule development tasks:
translations.基本上我以後應該不會再從頭開發 GAS，也不會從零開始 AI 寫程式，而是從零開: Basically, I probably won't develop GAS from scratch anymore, nor write AI code from zero. Instead, I'll have AI build the complete product for me from the start (code? IDGAF).
translations.基本上開發上需要的東西該有的都有了，實務上就是把這些服務組合串接起來，就能達成流: Basically, everything needed for development is already available. In practice, you just need to connect and combine these services to achieve process automation, for example:
translations.大型網站爬蟲、搶票程式，這也不用想了，Google Apps Script 很容: Large-scale web scraping or ticket-snatching programs are out of the question. Google Apps Script is easily blocked or stopped by Cloudflare's anti-scraping measures.
translations.大約是從 2021 年開始用 Google Apps Script 開發小工具串: I started using Google Apps Script around 2021 to develop small tools for automating and optimizing workflows. Back then, AI and RPA automation were rarely discussed. The goal was simply to improve team collaboration efficiency or enhance personal comfort. All scripts were hand-coded line by line (which now seems like an old-fashioned way of programming). **But the hardest part wasn’t the coding itself; it was whether and how to integrate with other services, and how to think outside the box for integration.**
translations.如果你想要複製出 Clasp Token 放到 CI/CD Secret 上執行: If you want to copy the Clasp Token to put into CI/CD Secrets for running tasks, you can use `cat ~/.clasprc.json | base64 | pbcopy` (remember to add base64 encode). When using it, run `echo "$CLASPRC" | base64 --decode > ~/.clasprc.json && chmod 600 ~/.clasprc.json`.
translations.如果是那個沒有 AI 的年代，手搓從 0 包含設計、切版、程式邏輯開發到上線，我: If it were the pre-AI era, manually handling everything from design, slicing, programming logic development to deployment would take me about 30 hours; now with AI, it can be done within 3 hours.
translations.如果發現問題，可以再請 AI 修正。\n\n: If any issues are found, you can ask the AI to fix them again.
translations.如果這篇文章有激起你的創意，不妨想想還能串接顯示什麼，例如我多串接了 Yahoo: If this article sparks your creativity, consider integrating other data sources to display, such as connecting to Yahoo Finance to get real-time stock prices of your watched stocks, or linking AnalyticsData / AdSense to monitor your website traffic and ad performance.
translations.必須建立一個專案目錄然後進入\n\n: You must create a project directory and then enter it.
translations.最大的優勢是直接無痛串接 Google 本家相關服務，Web App 存取方式可: The biggest advantage is the seamless integration with Google's native services. The Web App access can be set to the script owner, organization members, signed-in Google accounts, or anyone, **without the need to handle complex OAuth flows yourself—just one click to set up, one click to complete, and one click to start running**:
translations.最後順手建立一個倒數日資料來源 Google Sheet，以後要加資料只要增加到: Finally, create a countdown data source Google Sheet. In the future, just add data to this Sheet when needed.
translations.最近嘗試的另一個 AI 直接搞定 Google Apps Script 的案例，: Another recent AI case I tried was directly handling Google Apps Script. I asked it to convert my Google Sheet stock portfolio into a visual Web App, integrating Yahoo Finance to fetch the latest stock prices and display them in a table. Below the table, there’s a quick input area for buy/sell records, which then syncs back to the Google Sheet.
translations.最近開始嘗試從 0 就使用 AI 直接開發 Google Apps Script: Recently, I started trying to develop Google Apps Script directly from scratch using AI, combined with the basic knowledge above (**even without it, AI proficiency is very high**); **the completion and accuracy are almost 100%,** marking the end of the era of "AI coding from zero."
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本身非 Google 家族，例如想串接 Microsoft Office or: Not part of the Google ecosystem, such as wanting to connect with Microsoft Office or OneNote…
translations.目前專案是空的，只有 `appsscript.json` 一個設定檔。\n\n: The current project is empty, containing only the `appsscript.json` configuration file.
translations.等待 AI 完成設計… **AI 可能會在完成後用 Playwright 截圖驗: Waiting for AI to complete the design… **AI might use Playwright to take a screenshot for verification after finishing. If you want to save tokens and verify the result yourself, you can add that instruction to the prompt.**
translations.自動彙整營運數據到 Google Sheet、數據 Dashboard Web：:
Automatically aggregate operational data into Google Sheet and data Dashboard Web:  
Trigger scheduled execution of functions, use LockService to ensure only I run it, fetch data with Analytics Data API, get external service data via UrlFetchApp, write to Google Sheet with SpreadsheetApp, output Web App interface using HtmlService, output JSON data with ContentService plus data caching via CacheService.
translations.自動查詢 GA 流量/Crash-free rate 發到 Slack 工作 C:
Automatically Query GA Traffic/Crash-free Rate and Send to Slack Work Channel:  
Use Analytics Data API to fetch data, PropertiesService to store Slack Bot Token, and UrlFetchApp to call Slack Send Message API.
translations.行事曆默認只處理主行事曆，如果你有其他行事曆可以從行事曆 設定與共用 -> 整合: The calendar defaults to handling only the primary calendar. If you have other calendars, you can get the Calendar ID from Calendar Settings and Sharing -> Integrate calendar -> Calendar ID.
translations.複雜計算或是大量資料處理，每個執行階段最多 6 分鐘會跑不完\n: Complex calculations or large data processing may not complete within the 6-minute maximum execution time per run.
translations.要讓 AI Agent 可以幫你開發 Google Apps Script，我們: To enable an AI Agent to help you develop Google Apps Script, we need to complete some basic infrastructure.
translations.還有一些太小的案例就不列舉出來了， **總之想傳達的是「辦法總比困難多」實際寫程: There are also some smaller cases not listed here. **In short, the point is "there are always more solutions than problems." Actually writing the code is the easiest part; the real challenge is overcoming various obstacles to integrate everything together.**
translations.隨便選擇一個有函式的檔案，選擇一個函式點偵錯：\n\n: Randomly select a file with functions, then choose a function to debug:
translations.雖然我們都跟 AI 說好了但他還是有可能卡在一些地方需要人工幫忙，例如以上訊息；: Although we have agreed with the AI, it may still get stuck in some places and need manual help, such as the message above; **we just simply follow its steps to click and run the function once, then tell it OK, just like helping out. (If the method it mentioned doesn't appear, just refresh the page)**
